- 14.1 The artificial world as it stands (10) · 14.2 The trajectories: techno-optimist, techno-pessimist, techno-realist (12) · 14.3 What only the next generation will see (12) · 14.4 What the engineer's child should learn (12) · 14.5 The engineer in the world to come (12) · 14.6 Closing the twelve volumes: the thesis returns (15) · 14.7 The author's posture: what the reader keeps after the book (15) · 14.8 The book ends; the work does not (12)
